title: primula suaveolens subsp. tommasinii
intro: Primula suaveolens subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family, Primulaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Primula suaveolens subsp. tommasinii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
